failed.reason:
Need NTA figures for 3 full years.
Suggested remedy: Provide NTA ≥ ₹3 cr for each of the last 3 full years.
failed.title: NTA ≥ ₹3 cr in each of the last 3 years

failed.reason:
Need operating profit figures for 3 full years.
Suggested remedy: Demonstrate ≥ ₹15 cr operating profit in each of the last 3 full years.
failed.title: Operating profit ≥ ₹15 cr in each of the last 3 years

failed.reason:
Need net worth figures for 3 full years.
Suggested remedy: Increase equity/retained earnings to meet ≥ ₹1 cr in each of the last 3 full years.
failed.title: Net worth ≥ ₹1 cr in each of the last 3 years

failed.reason:
Issuer has not applied to a stock exchange.
Suggested remedy: Apply to a stock exchange and designate one.
failed.title: Apply to stock exchange (in‑principle)

failed.reason:
Depository agreement not executed.
Suggested remedy: Execute a depository agreement.
failed.title: Depository agreement executed

failed.reason:
Promoter‑held securities not fully dematerialised.
Suggested remedy: Dematerialise all promoter‑held securities.
failed.title: Promoters’ holdings fully in demat

failed.reason:
Partly‑paid equity shares are outstanding.
Suggested remedy: Fully pay or forfeit all partly‑paid equity shares.
failed.title: No partly‑paid equity outstanding

failed.reason:
Less than 75 % of finance is tied up via verifiable means.
Suggested remedy: Tie up 75 % of finance through verifiable means.
failed.title: 75 % means of finance tied up (verifiable)

failed.reason:
OFS shares not held for ≥ 1 year before DRHP and no applicable carve‑out.
Suggested remedy: Hold OFS shares for ≥ 1 year before DRHP or satisfy a carve‑out.
failed.title: OFS shares must be held ≥ 1 year pre‑DRHP (with carve‑outs)
